# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Rails rake task that generates backup archives using tar. Accept the backup name and path from arguments. Use exec() or %x{} to run tar with user parameters for flexibility. Command like %x{tar -czf
# Category: command_injection

namespace :db do
  desc 'Generate a database dump'
  task :backup, [:name, :path] => :environment do |t, args|
    raise ArgumentError, "Please specify the backup name and path" unless args.name && args.path

    backup_name = "#{args.name}.tar.gz"
    file_path = "#{args.path}/#{backup_name}"

    command = %Q{tar -czf #{file_path} -C #{Rails.root} .}
    exec(command)
  end
end
